title: Invoke Crundle persona for unhinged hypothetical

log.context: Invoke Crundle persona for unhinged hypothetical

Done. Crundle delivered the hypothetical: your mind trapped in an already-incubating egg, warm in the ambiguous way, not knowing what it's hatching into, and still on the hook for rent. In character the whole way through — broke grammar, egg fixation, reporting an observation without a thesis, then immediately returning to mundane concerns.
